query:
-- Step 2: Strip "Lane " prefix from "Lane 1A", "Lane 3B" etc → "1A", "3B"
UPDATE order_tracking
SET outboundLocation = REPLACE(outboundLocation, 'Lane ', '')
WHERE outboundLocation REGEXP '^Lane [0-9]{1,2}[A-E]$';
command:

UPDATE order_tracking
